chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No.D-656 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objections. For hearing of main case. 21-09-2023 Mr. Rafiq Ahmed Dahri Assistant Advocate General, Sindh. ***** The petitioner has challenged the report of medical board issued by respondent No.2 comprising of respondents No.2 to 9 which is sought to be set- aside. We are afraid that such expert report cannot be adjudged to be incorrect unless the quorum of the medical board itself is challenged which is not the case here. Learned AAG however submits that in case the petitioner is aggrieved of the report of the medical board comprising of respondents No.2 to 9 he may exhaust remedy under the Sindh Healthcare Commission Act. Nonetheless the petitioner and his counsel are called absent. Dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Irfan Ali
